title: Help - any real estate transaction management users out there?
excerpt: I’m still in the trial and don’t understand how to assign a list of recurring tasks to properties

posts.author: lizbrent (liz brent)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m still in the trial and don’t understand how to assign a list of recurring tasks to properties

posts.author: ShellyK (Shelly Katzir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Many property management and RE investments companies use Moneylogz for monday.com to sync their financial transactions, mortgage balances and payments from any of thousands of supported financial institutions, straight into monday.com boards.

Extremely useful for companies who have to keep track of hundreds of mortgage accounts / financial accounts.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
